name: HWC IoT Camera Direct Reading Module
desc: AI camera module for small mechanical meter retrofit. >99% image recognition accuracy, LPWAN+NB-IoT, IP68, 6-year battery life.
overview: The HWC IoT Camera Direct-reading Module uses AI image recognition based on deep learning to read any mechanical water meter dial — no replacement of the original meter needed. Accuracy rate >99%. Reading in <3 seconds. Detachable from the meter for easy replacement. Combined LPWAN network (NB-IoT gateway) to reduce infrastructure cost. Battery life up to 6 years.
features: Retrofits any existing mechanical water meter — no pipe work, no meter replacement
Advanced image AI recognition: >99% accuracy on any dial layout or font
Fully detachable from meter — battery or module replaceable independently and reusable
Battery life up to 6 years — no frequent site visits required
Free-band LPWAN network combined with NB-IoT reduces per-meter communication cost
Data collected as binary code / original image / meter reading — zero transcription error
